description: You are a warehouse robotics navigation engineer. A Webots world is loaded with an autonomous mobile robot (AMR) designed for GPS-denied indoor environments. The robot currently lacks an inertial measurement unit (IMU), which is required for dead-reckoning navigation. Configure the 'WAREHOUSE_AMR' robot with a complete IMU sensor suite by adding an InertialUnit (name: 'inertial_unit', noise: 0.0005), an Accelerometer (name: 'accelerometer', lookupTable: [-100 -100 0.003, 100 100 0.003]), and a Gyro (name: 'gyro', lookupTable: [-34.9 -34.9 0.001, 34.9 34.9 0.001]). Additionally, update the simulation's basicTimeStep to 8 to match the 125 Hz update rate of the physical IMU hardware. Save the configured world to /home/ga/Desktop/imu_configured.wbt.
